entry.title: New: RES25-223 (Honolulu) — MAYOR
entry.content:
(FOR CONDEMNATION) PROVIDING FOR THE ACQUISITION OF WASTEWATER PUMP STATIONS AND AN ADJACENT ROADWAY IN FEE FOR PUBLIC USE SITUATED AT MOANALUA, HONOLULU, OʻAHU, HAWAI’I AND DETERMINING AND DECLARING THE NECESSITY OF THE ACQUISITION BY EMINENT DOMAIN.

Latest action: Returned approved.

View on the council site
